texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sealed  Quotations  are invited by the undersigned  from experienced  book suppliers/publishers/dealers for supply  of several  books to Women's Polytechnic, Hapania, Tripura.  The detailed  list of these books including  title and author of these books  are available in Annexure-I. Following instructions should be followed for submitting sealed quotations.
texts.text: Sealed  Quotations  are invited by the undersigned  from experienced  book suppliers/publishers/dealers for supply  of several  books to Women's Polytechnic, Hapania, Tripura.  The detailed  list of these books including  title and author of these books  are available in Annexure-I. Following instructions should be followed for submitting sealed quotations.
